response.justification: Candidate is a strong generalist senior engineer with deep web, backend, and DLang experience, but the role demands 5–10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows plus SQL Server/Oracle and capital markets / fixed income domain knowledge. Resume shows only a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments (Dec 2014 – Jun 2015) on a cross-platform IDE, no Windows-specific C++ work, no SQL Server/Oracle, and no investment banking or fixed-income exposure. Skills listed do not include C++ at all.
strengths: Long, varied senior engineering career with strong fundamentals (TDD, CI/CD, craftsmanship)
Some prior C/C++ experience at National Instruments on a developer-tooling product
Polyglot background (DLang, Java, Node, TypeScript) suggests fast ramp-up on new stacks
concerns: No demonstrated capital markets, investment banking, or fixed-income domain experience
C++ experience is ~6 months from 2015 and not on Windows; C++ not even listed in skills
No SQL Server or Oracle experience shown; SQL exposure appears limited to MongoDB/MySQL

key_factors.factor: No fixed income / capital markets domain
